unauthorized.subtitle: Unauthorized
unauthorized.description: Your login status is invalid or expired. Please sign in before continuing.

forbidden.subtitle: Forbidden
forbidden.description: You are not authorized to access this page.

notFound.subtitle: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for might have been removed, renamed, or is temporarily unavailable.

serverError.subtitle: Internal Server Error
serverError.description: The server encountered an unexpected condition which prevented it from fulfilling the request.

serviceUnavailable.subtitle: Service Unavailable
serviceUnavailable.description: The server is currently unable to handle the request because of temporary overload or maintenance.

signUp.title: Sign Up
signUp.description: Enter your account and password to create an account.
signUp.failedRetry: Sign up failed. Please try again later.
signUp.fillRequired: Please complete required fields before submitting.
signUp.agreePrefix: By creating an account, you agree to our

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage admin preferences, theme, and notification options.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Maintain the current admin account avatar and nickname.
profile.basicDescription: Changes are synchronized to the current session and sidebar user info immediately.
profile.avatarTips: Supports jpeg, jpg, svg, png, webp. Max 1MB per image.

account.title: Account Settings
account.description: Manage the default language and sign-in password for the admin account.
account.languageDescription: The language preference is stored in this browser and reused the next time you sign in.
account.passwordDescription: Enter the current password and set a new sign-in password.

appearancePreferences.title: Appearance preferences
appearancePreferences.description: Configure admin appearance preferences for this browser. Changes are saved automatically.
appearancePreferences.shortcutDescription: Quickly adjust admin theme, layout, and menu style.
appearancePreferences.savedHint: Preferences save automatically in this browser.
appearancePreferences.themeDescription: Choose the color mode, shadcn palette, radius, and admin font.
appearancePreferences.componentStyleHint: This is a runtime appearance preset. It does not rewrite components.json or generated component source.
appearancePreferences.layoutDescription: Tune the admin workspace width, menu behavior, and sidebar startup state.
appearancePreferences.displayDescription: Adjust motion and optional chrome for dense admin work.
appearancePreferences.stripedTablesDescription: Show alternating row backgrounds where supported.

componentStyleDescriptions.reka-vega: Balanced default surfaces and control hierarchy.
componentStyleDescriptions.reka-nova: Brighter lifted cards and crisp controls.
componentStyleDescriptions.reka-maia: Tighter borders for dense admin pages.
componentStyleDescriptions.reka-mira: Translucent layers and more pronounced focus states.
componentStyleDescriptions.reka-luma: High-contrast direct surfaces with minimal depth.

users.title: User Management
users.description: Manage admin accounts, roles, statuses, and password resets.
users.formDescription: Maintain the account, profile, role, status, and avatar fields.
users.filterDescription: Filter admin users by nickname, role, and status.
users.deleteDescription: The user record cannot be restored after deletion. Please confirm whether to continue.
users.protectedAdminCannotDelete: The built-in super administrator sakura cannot be deleted
users.protectedAdminCannotDisable: The built-in super administrator sakura cannot be disabled
users.resetPasswordDescription: The user's password will be reset to the default password 12345678. Continue?
users.enableDescription: The user will be able to log in again after being enabled.
users.disableDescription: The user will no longer be able to log in after being disabled.

form.avatarPlaceholder: Supports jpeg, jpg, svg, png, and webp. Max 1MB per image.

home.title: Sakura Passage AI turns agent collaboration into image-text creation.
home.description: A tutorial-grade platform centered on AI agent collaboration and multimodal content generation, built with Spring Boot 3, Spring AI Alibaba, and Vue3.
home.guideDesc: The user portal focuses on AI creation entry points, while the admin console maintains users, system configuration, and future creation resources.
home.accessNote: After unified authentication, role permissions determine whether admin access is allowed.

metrics.contentHint: Generate articles, prompts, and images together

features.agentDesc: Build an orchestrated creation flow from topic planning to writing, polishing, and image generation.
features.imageDesc: Cover text-to-image, image-to-image, multi-model image generation, and Nano Banana Pro.
features.adminDesc: Users with admin roles can jump into the console to maintain platform configuration and creation resources.

highlights.workflowContent: Demonstrates the full chain from topic planning and article generation to automatic illustrations.
highlights.imageContent: Gradually integrates 7 image generation modes for comparing generation strategies.
highlights.configContent: Administrators can maintain system configuration, users, and future creation resources.

login.title: User Login
login.description: A unified login entry for quickly building full-stack Web applications with role-based redirects.
login.failedRetry: Login failed, please try again later.
login.demoTip: The sample password must satisfy the backend minimum length of 8. Demo accounts are shown in the login form.
login.agreePrefix: By signing in, you agree to our
login.fillRequired: Please complete required fields before signing in.

user.title: Sign in to the Creation Platform
user.description: Enter your account and password to access the AI image-text creation platform. The platform routes each user by account role.
user.heroTitle: An AI image-text creation platform centered on agent collaboration.
user.heroDescription: Unified login, role routing, and baseline admin capabilities are already built in. Article generation, workflow orchestration, and multimodal illustration can be added on top.

features.creation: The user portal focuses on creation entry points for future article generation and illustration workflows.
features.resources: Built-in admin modules cover common capabilities such as users, dictionaries, and agreements.
features.switchAdmin: Unified authentication and role routing are wired in, so creation features can extend their own permission rules.

admin.title: Sign in to the Platform
admin.description: Enter your account and password to continue. The platform routes each user by account role.
admin.heroTitle: Start with unified authentication and build full-stack Web apps faster.
admin.heroDescription: The platform provides login, permission-based routing, admin layout, and baseline business modules to reduce repeated setup work.

features.dashboard: Admin users land on the backend dashboard for baseline management and business configuration.
features.permission: Backend access is still controlled by user roles, so unifying the page does not weaken permission boundaries.
features.switchUser: The admin header keeps a frontend shortcut for quick switching between the console and app frontend.

dicts.title: Dictionary Management
dicts.description: Maintain core information for dictionary types and dictionary items.
dicts.selectTypeFirst: Select a dictionary type before managing its items.
dicts.emptyItems: No dictionary items under the selected type
dicts.deleteTypeDescription: The backend will block deletion when items still exist under this type.
dicts.deleteItemDescription: The dictionary item cannot be restored after deletion. Please confirm whether to continue.

typeForm.description: Maintain the dictionary code, name, status, and remark.

itemForm.description: The item will always be bound to the currently selected dictionary type.
itemForm.typeRequired: Please select a dictionary type first

agreements.title: Agreement Management
agreements.description: Maintain rich-text content such as user agreements and privacy policies.
agreements.deleteDesc: The agreement content cannot be restored after deletion. Please confirm whether to continue.

help.title: Help Center
help.description: Find help resources and community channels.
help.alertDesc: You can find answers to common questions in our help center.

accounts.github: Project source code or tutorial materials can be linked to the configured GitHub repository.
accounts.discord: Join our Discord server to ask questions, share projects, and get involved in the community.

hero.title: Do you dare to use 365 days to witness a complete transformation?
hero.subtitle: The hourglass of time is bursting with thunder. When the quantitative change breaks through the critical point, every morning and evening you work hard will turn into a sea of stars!

feature1.title: Use modern technology
feature1.description: More modern component library, free to customize each component

feature2.title: Easy to deploy
feature2.description: One-click deployment to your server, no complicated configuration required

feature3.title: Open source code
feature3.description: Every line of code is open source, you can modify and extend it freely

feature4.title: Community support
feature4.description: You can find help in the community and share your experience

evaluation.title: Evaluation
evaluation.subtitle: These evaluations are simulated data, not actual data

pricingPlans.title: Pricing Plans
pricingPlans.subtitle: Choose the plan that suits you

features.feature1: Use part of the website code
